<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Voice; use Psr\Container\ContainerInterface; use Vonage\Client\APIResource; use Vonage\Client\Credentials\Handler\KeypairHandler; class ClientFactory { public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container): Client { /** @var APIResource $api */ $api = $container->make(APIResource::class); $api ->setBaseUri('/v1/calls') ->setAuthHandlers(new KeypairHandler()) ->setCollectionName('calls'); return new Client($api); } }
